title: Add fall 2025 market schedule
description: Updates the schedule section with the fall lineup and removes the ended summer stalls. Closes #1.
author: yvesquinn

title: Build catering inquiry form
description: Adds the Netlify Forms inquiry form with event date, headcount, and tourtiere count plus a honeypot. Closes #2.
author: mara-dev

title: Convert hero images to WebP
description: Compresses and converts the market hero photos to WebP. Still checking the largest one against the 300KB budget. Closes #3.
author: yvesquinn

title: Add size and quantity dropdown
description: Replaces the free-text size field with size and quantity dropdowns and updates the quote preview. Closes #2.
author: yvesquinn

title: Add phone number validation
description: Validates the phone field on inquiry submissions and shows an inline error for unreachable numbers. Closes #1.
author: mara-dev
